_meta.purpose: Defines the standard runtime envelope added to all workflow outputs for observability and traceability
applies_to: all workflows in the store-os chain
_meta.cloud_compatibility: All runtime envelope fields are computed inline — no filesystem access required. Full compatibility with n8n Cloud.
_meta.self_hosted_notes: In self-hosted mode, runtime.env will reflect the actual STORE_OS_ENV value. persistence_mode will be 'disk' instead of 'cloud-inline'.

runtime._description: Identity and execution context of this phase invocation
runtime.run_id: string — unique run ID, format: run-{yyyymmdd}-{random4}

status._description: Phase outcome. Additive to existing 'status' key — structured expansion
status.fatal_errors: array of ValidationResult issues with severity=fatal

diagnostics._description: Observability layer — log-friendly summaries and lineage

lineage.upstream_phases: array of phase_ids consumed as input

diagnostics.missing_data: array of { field, reason, impact } — explicit unknown fields

implementation_notes.additive_only: The envelope is ADDED alongside existing output keys. Existing keys (project_id, artifact_path, artifact_name, store_profile, status, cloud_mode, cloud_warnings) are preserved unchanged.
implementation_notes.status_key_evolution: The existing top-level 'status' string key ('SUCCESS') is preserved. The new envelope adds a nested 'envelope.status' object. These are separate keys.
implementation_notes.run_id_generation: In n8n Cloud (no crypto module): use Date.now() + Math.random().toString(36).slice(2,6). In self-hosted: same pattern is acceptable.
implementation_notes.backward_compatibility: All envelope fields are optional additions. Orchestrators reading only existing keys will not be affected.
